headline: Issa Diop
body: 🚨🚜 Ipswich Town reach verbal agreement to sign Issa Diop from Fulham for €10m fee. Four year contract, as Santi_J_FM reports.
raw_text:
🚨🚜 Ipswich Town reach verbal agreement to sign Issa Diop from Fulham for €10m fee.

Four year contract, as @Santi_J_FM reports.
